commands.review_summary:
The PR centralizes Control UI exec/plugin approval prompt resolution in the approval controller, treats stale gateway resolve errors as terminal cleanup, adds neutral dismiss/reopen behavior, and expands focused UI/gateway tests.

PR surface: Source +262, Tests +415. Total +677 across 12 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main sends modal cancel/Escape through deny and turns stale resolve failures into execApprovalError. The PR body also reports manual A/B where main stayed stuck and the PR cleared the modal.
commands.review_followup: The remaining action is maintainer UX judgment and normal PR validation, not a narrow automated repair.

target.title: Fix stale approval prompts in Control UI
target.body:
Summary:
- Harden Control UI approval prompts when the UI acts on an approval that has already been resolved elsewhere or no longer exists.
- Treat stale resolve responses as terminal UI cleanup signals: `APPROVAL_ALREADY_RESOLVED`, `APPROVAL_NOT_FOUND`, and `unknown or expired approval id` now dismiss the prompt and refresh pending approvals.
- Keep modal close/Escape as a neutral local dismiss instead of sending Deny. The modal has no visible Dismiss action button.

Bug summary:
An exec approval can be shown in Discord and in the OpenClaw Control UI at the same time. If Discord resolves it first and the web UI misses or delays the resolved event, the web modal can keep a stale approval id. On main, clicking Deny on that stale modal reports a backend error and leaves the modal open.

Root cause:
Current main removes a prompt when the web client receives `exec.approval.resolved` or `plugin.approval.resolved`, so normal event delivery is fine. The broken path is stale local UI state: `handleExecApprovalDecision` catches every resolve error as `execApprovalError` and does not treat stale backend responses as terminal cleanup. The modal cancel path also calls `handleExecApprovalDecision("deny")`, so Escape/backdrop can hit the same stale backend error.

Fix summary:
The approval controller now owns stale cleanup. Success removes the active prompt. Stale backend errors remove it, refresh `exec.approval.list` and `plugin.approval.list`, and keep only still-pending approvals. `exec.approval.resolved` and `plugin.approval.resolved` clear matching queue/error state. Escape/backdrop only hide the active prompt locally and leave resolving state clear, so unrelated errors cannot permanently disable closing.

Main behavior checked:
- The bug exists on current main. In Chrome on main, I forced a stale modal id and clicked Deny. The UI showed `Approval failed: GatewayRequestError: unknown or expired approval id`, and Escape left the modal open.
- Discord-resolved events do reach the web UI when delivered. In the live Discord path, denying externally emitted `exec.approval.resolved` and the connected Control UI modal disappeared.
- The confusing case where Deny appears to work on main is usually not the stale failure path: same-decision duplicate Deny is backend-idempotent success, and clicking a still-pending approval is normal success.

Verification:
- Rebased branch on current `origin/main` at `3452382cc0`.
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_FS_MODULE_CACHE_PATH=.artifacts/vitest-cache-approval-modal-rebase node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/controllers/exec-approval.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/exec-approval.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/exec-approval.browser.test.ts --run` passed, 4 files / 90 tests.
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 ui/src/styles/components.css ui/src/ui/app-gateway-chat-load.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.sessions.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.ts ui/src/ui/app-view-state.ts ui/src/ui/app.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/exec-approval.test.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/exec-approval.ts ui/src/ui/views/exec-approval.browser.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/exec-approval.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/exec-approval.ts` passed.
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs ui/src/styles/components.css ui/src/ui/app-gateway-chat-load.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.sessions.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.ts ui/src/ui/app-view-state.ts ui/src/ui/app.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/exec-approval.test.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/exec-approval.ts ui/src/ui/views/exec-approval.browser.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/exec-approval.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/exec-approval.ts` passed.
- `pnpm tsgo:test:ui` passed.
- Manual A/B with Computer Use: main/Chrome stayed stuck after stale Deny plus Escape; PR/Safari dismissed stale externally-resolved approvals after stale Deny and refreshed pending approvals.

Behavior addressed: stale Control UI exec/plugin approval modals when local UI state outlives backend approval state.
Real environment tested: local Control UI against two local Gateway instances, Discord-triggered approvals, focused Vitest coverage, oxlint, oxfmt, and UI typecheck.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: opened PR UI at `localhost:19010`, opened main/control UI at `localhost:19170`, resolved approvals externally through Discord or forced a stale id, then clicked Deny/Escape in the web modal.
Evidence after fix: PR UI removed the stale modal after stale Deny; main UI kept the modal open with `unknown or expired approval id`; focused tests cover resolved events, stale resolve errors, success cleanup, close/dismiss state, and refresh behavior.
Observed result after fix: stale externally-resolved approvals no longer leave the modal stuck, stale Deny removes the prompt, resolved events clear active prompt errors, and Escape/backdrop remains usable.
What was not tested: a fresh Slack-specific stale approval flow after the final rebase.
target.author: jesse-merhi
